question: What are the detail and id of the teacher who teaches the largest number of courses?
sql: SELECT t.teacher_id, t.teacher_details FROM Teachers t JOIN Classes c ON t.teacher_id = c.teacher_id GROUP BY t.teacher_id ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1;

back_translation.intent: 查找每个教师关联的班级数量，并显示最多班级数的教师信息
